title: Medical Examination
content:
SECTION 67. Standard of Medical Examination. - The licensed manning agency shall ensure that the medical examination conducted is in accordance with prescribed and acceptable international standards, and the requirements of the principal/employer.

SECTION 68. When to Require Medical/Health Examination. - The licensed manning agency shall require an applicant for overseas employment to undergo medical/health examination with a DOH-accredited medical clinic only after the licensed manning agency has interviewed the seafarer, and that there is a reasonable certainty that the seafarer shall be hired and deployed to a ship of its principal/employer.
